body.title: Simulator — execution sandbox for builder step-tracing
body.result: simulator.py + device.replay_and_analyze already existed; wrote 21 pytest tests across 3 closed-ticket log datasets, all pass
body.intention: I intend that we can replay closed tickets step-by-step to observe why DickSimnel makes its decisions without live inference.
body.description:
Build TicketSimulator for event-sourcing replay of closed tickets. Enables single-stepping through builder decisions, answering tool calls from cache + CC shim, observing divergence from optimal path. Foundation for Critic training and pattern mining.

Replay API: load datacenter_logs/T-xxx/, iterate turns, answer tool calls from cache (or escalate to CC for reasoning). Immutable event stream: (timestamp, turn, decision_point, tool_call, result, outcome).

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/simulator.py (new), devices/dicksimnel/device.py (integrate TicketSimulator), datacenter_logs/ (source)
**Design rules:** log every interface crossing (tool calls, decision points), event sourcing pattern from unseenuniversity/rules/event-sourcing
**Scope boundary:** In: replay engine + cached tool responder + event stream schema. Out: Critic validation, pattern extraction (separate tickets)
**Completion criteria:** (1) TicketSimulator.replay(T-provider-health-classifier) completes without live inference, (2) all tool calls answered from cache or CC shim, (3) decision_points logged (why builder chose this tool), (4) event stream reconstructable from logs. Tested on 3 closed tickets.
